description:
Add TypeScript build rules to nix/buck2/prelude-extensions/typescript/:

Rules needed:
- typescript_library: Compile TS to JS, produce type declarations
- typescript_binary: Runnable TS application (uses node)
- typescript_test: Run TS tests (jest or similar)
- TypeScript toolchain definition

Should integrate with prelude's existing patterns for providers and toolchains.
title: Create TypeScript rules in prelude-extensions
